Aerospace and Defense
What to do Segments What’s trending Leaders Careers
What to do Segments What’s trending Leaders Careers

Aerospace consulting

Navigate headwinds in Aerospace and Defense. From economic uncertainty, supply chain disruptions and skill gaps, the Aerospace and Defense Industry is being challenged. The key is to have a digital-first mindset.

Aerospace and defense now

84%

of companies focus on transforming parts of their business rather than the whole and tend to treat transformation as a finite program rather than a continuous process

75%

of executives expect up to a fifth of their workforce to reskill or work in new domains using new tech within the next five years

14%

expected YOY revenue increase of 2023 global commercial aerospace driven by air traffics’ strong recovery

67%

of executives believe short-term supply chain disruption will be a challenge

How to reinvent aerospace and defense

Close
Resilient Supply Chain

Digitize to make your supply chain network more responsive and resilient

Over half of the executives still rely on manual supply chain processes. Join the 45% and embrace agility and resilience through new tech. Learn how to upgrade your supply chain by digitizing it.
Learn more
Resilient Supply Chain

Digitize to make your supply chain network more responsive and resilient

Over half of the executives still rely on manual supply chain processes. Join the 45% and embrace agility and resilience through new tech. Learn how to upgrade your supply chain by digitizing it.
Learn more
Close
Digital Production & Operations

Revolutionize digital product engineering and manufacturing

96% of execs believe generative AI is key to modernizing tech architecture. Competitors are already leveraging it. Learn how to unleash AI’s full potential and lead the revolution.
Learn more
Digital Production & Operations

Revolutionize digital product engineering and manufacturing

96% of execs believe generative AI is key to modernizing tech architecture. Competitors are already leveraging it. Learn how to unleash AI’s full potential and lead the revolution.
Learn more
Close
Technology Transformation

Leverage technology to innovate, build revenue sources, and optimize operations

All executives view tech as vital for transformation. Use it to innovate continuously, increase competitive edge, and open new revenue channels while optimizing operations. We can help you harness the tech power now.
Learn more
Technology Transformation

Leverage technology to innovate, build revenue sources, and optimize operations

All executives view tech as vital for transformation. Use it to innovate continuously, increase competitive edge, and open new revenue channels while optimizing operations. We can help you harness the tech power now.
Learn more
Close
Talent transformation and skilling

Build a tech-enabled future workforce

58% of aerospace and defense leaders expect a shortage of digital talent over the next three years. So build your own. Invest in your people’s digital skills, and future-proof your workforce.
Learn more
Talent transformation and skilling

Build a tech-enabled future workforce

58% of aerospace and defense leaders expect a shortage of digital talent over the next three years. So build your own. Invest in your people’s digital skills, and future-proof your workforce.
Learn more
Close
Digital Engineering

Design and build products with more security, sustainability and speed

Developing aerospace and defense products relies on agility, sustainability and innovation. Model-based systems engineering supports all that plus manufacturing automation and connected production.
Learn more
Digital Engineering

Design and build products with more security, sustainability and speed

Developing aerospace and defense products relies on agility, sustainability and innovation. Model-based systems engineering supports all that plus manufacturing automation and connected production.
Learn more
Close
Net-Zero Transition

Embed carbon intelligence across your value chain to achieve net-zero

Rethink product technologies to achieve net-zero 2050 goals. New energy pathways can improve operational efficiency while addressing decarbonization.
Learn more
Net-Zero Transition

Embed carbon intelligence across your value chain to achieve net-zero

Rethink product technologies to achieve net-zero 2050 goals. New energy pathways can improve operational efficiency while addressing decarbonization.
Learn more

Segments we support

  • Commercial
    Commercial

    Connecting the world through commercial, business, general aviation, EVTOL aircraft and engines for passenger or cargo.

  • Defense
    Defense

    Ensuring national security with combat and non-combat aircraft including fixed wing, rotorcraft, and unmanned systems and engines.

  • Space
    Space

    Enabling the space economy through technological innovation. Includes government and commercial launch, satellites, cargo and crew vehicles, and services.

  • Aftermarket
    Aftermarket

    Ensuring safe and efficient operation of aerospace equipment throughout its lifecycle. Includes Parts, Maintenance, Repair and Overhaul (MRO) operations and training.

  • Maritime
    Maritime

    Reinventing Naval shipbuilding including surface ships, submarines, and unmanned systems.

What’s trending in aerospace and defense

View all work
Research Report
Resilience in flight: securing future growth amid volatility

The latest Accenture Commercial Aerospace Insight Report indicates that global revenues are on track for a 12% revenue increase in 2025.

Expand
Announcement
Accenture and Google Cloud Support Air France-KLM

Accenture and Google Cloud are collaborating with Air France-KLM  to establish a cutting-edge generative AI (gen AI) factory.

Expand
Research Report
Defense disrupted: New players, new pressures, new possibilities

This second annual Accenture International Defense Insight Report is an answer to the growing need for data-driven insight on changing dynamics in the global defense environme

Expand
Event
Paris Air Show 2025
JUNE 16 - 19, 2025
LE BOURGET I PARIS I VIP CHALET 37

Accenture will be attending the world’s largest Aerospace and Defense exhibition and air display—the 55th Paris Air Show.

Expand
Perspective
Navigating the new tariff landscape and its economic impact

U.S. tariffs have introduced unprecedented uncertainty for executives to adapt to. In this perspective, we outline four pillars of resilience that enable enterprise resilience and how they can help you navigate the new tariff landscape.

Expand
Research Report
Are you ready for autonomous supply chains?

Companies are seeing diminishing returns from classic business efficiency strategies. To create value, supply chains need to be fast, agile and sustainable, not just cost-efficient. Could AI-powered autonomy be the key to unlocking this?

Expand
Research Report
Space for growth

Accenture explores the space economy and how space-based technologies are driving business growth and resilience across industries.

Expand
Podcast
Aviation Week Check 6 podcast series with Accenture

Listen in to a series of special podcasts where Aviation Week speaks to Accenture’s aerospace and defense leaders on the latest industry developments.

Expand

Partners in change

Helping you unlock the value of your SAP application portfolio with the power of intelligence, innovation and industry.

Provides software and services across V1 industry domains allowing businesses to become more agile, flexible and adaptable.

Provide business and people with 3DEXPERIENCE universes to imagine sustainable innovations capable of harmonizing product, nature and life.

The largest global Microsoft practice. Eighteen-time Microsoft Global Alliance SI Partner of the Year. Powered by Avanade. Runs on Microsoft.

Leverage the experience of AWS and Accenture with proven technology offerings and industry-ready solutions.

Unleash empowering human-centric design and Google’s innovative tech.
